news_items.headline: Angels Jump on Matthew Liberatore Early, Beat St. Louis Cardinals Again
news_items.summary: How would the St. Louis Cardinals respond to two of the most disappointing games of the year? Tuesday night in Anaheim, it was Matthew Liberatore on the mound for the Cardinals and the game started like the Angels were reading his mind. To say that the game started off poorly for St. Louis would be […]

news_items.headline: Texas Baseball Massacre: Rangers blow out White Sox, 10-0
news_items.summary: South Side bats were non-existent while Texas beat up Chicago pitching in Tuesday’s 10-run shutout loss.

news_items.headline: Muncy's winning HR -- off Wheeler! -- ties Penguin for 5th on Dodgers' list
Zac Thornton’s emergence continues, mowing down Brewers for first career win
news_items.summary: Mets youngster Zac Thornton was spectacular again against one of baseball’s best, shutting the Brewers out across six strong innings on Tuesday night to take home his first career victory.

news_items.headline: Mets Notes: Luis Robert Jr. working to find rhythm, outfield defense shows out in Milwaukee
news_items.summary: Following the Mets' 4-0 win over the Brewers on Tuesday, Andy Green and the players talked about Luis Robert Jr.'s home run and the outfield defense that was on display.

news_items.headline: Royals continue second-half roll with win over Giants
news_items.summary: The All-Star break may have been just what the Royals needed. Kansas City won their fourth game in five tries since the Midsummer Classic with a 3-2 victory over the Giants on Tuesday night. Luinder Avila was solid over 6.1 innings, and Nick Loftin provided the go-ahead run as Alex Lange was able to slam […]
